description_long: This is a male adult figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides. The figure is shirtless, revealing a defined torso and arms, and is wearing fitted pants that extend to the ankles. The pants appear to be of a utilitarian style, possibly suitable for outdoor or urban environments. The feet are covered with simple, form-fitting shoes. The facial features are realistic, with short, neatly styled hair and a neutral expression. The overall appearance suggests a modern, urban pedestrian, ready for movement or interaction in a city setting.
description: A shirtless, muscular adult male standing upright in fitted pants and simple shoes, with realistic facial features and short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the defined torso, facial features, and the full length of the pants and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the straight posture of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad back, back of the pants, and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and leg, mirroring the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted pants, no shirt, simple shoes
